start.welcome:
👋 Hi, {name}!

I'll create images for you from text descriptions using AI. Just describe what to draw.

🎨 Tap «Create» to start.
start.help: PromptArt — AI image generator & editor Commands: /start — main menu /edit — combine / edit your photos /settings — model and style settings /history — recent generations /favorites — saved favorites /balance — pollen balance and prices /help — this help Create from scratch: 1. Tap «🎨 Create» 2. Describe the image 3. Wait 5–15 seconds Edit your photos: 1. Tap «✏️ Edit» 2. Send 1–4 photos 3. Describe what to do («combine», «replace background», «put the cat on the throne») Powered by Pollinations.ai
generation.nsfw: ⚠️ Request rejected by filter. Avoid names of real people and explicit content.
generation.daily_limit: 📊 Daily limit reached ({limit} generations). Come back tomorrow or use /upgrade.
generation.empty_prompt: Prompt can't be empty. Describe the image.
generation.too_long: Prompt too long. Keep it under 500 characters.
generation.premium_required: 💰 The {model} model requires more pollen than your account has. Switch to flux or zimage in /settings.
settings.title: ⚙️ Settings Model: {model} Size: {ratio} Style: {style}
balance.models_header: Image models — what you can afford right now:
balance.unavailable_permission: 💰 Balance: hidden — your API key lacks the profile usage permission. Generate a new key at enter.pollinations.ai with that scope to see balance here.
balance.help_permission: 💰 To show your pollen balance here, your API key needs the profile usage permission. How to get one: 1. Go to enter.pollinations.ai 2. Open the Keys page 3. Create a new key with permissions profile + usage 4. Give it to the bot admin to put in the env Until then, check your balance at enter.pollinations.ai.
history.title: 📜 Your history
history.empty: No generations yet. Create your first one — tap «🎨 Create».
favorites.title: 💾 Your favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Save generations you like with the «💾 Favorite» button.
edit.ask_input: 🖼 Image editing Send me 1–4 photos, then a text description of what to do (e.g. «combine them», «replace background with neon city», «add a hat from photo 2 to person on photo 1»). Press «❌ Cancel» to exit.
edit.from_existing: 📸 Photo loaded. Send more photos (up to 4 total) or describe how to edit this one.
edit.gen_missing: 😢 Original photo is no longer available. Try generating a new one.
edit.photo_received: 📸 Photo {n}/4 received. Send more photos or send the description.
edit.too_many: ⚠️ Up to 4 photos per edit. Send the description now.
edit.no_photos: 🖼 Please send at least 1 photo before describing the edit.
edit.error: 😢 Editing failed. Try a different model in /settings or rephrase.
edit.download_failed: 😢 Couldn't download one of your photos. Try again.
settings.choose_edit_model: {balance} Choose a model for image editing (only models that accept image input):
settings.no_edit_models: No image-input models available right now. Try later.
enhance.error: Couldn't enhance prompt. Using the original.
errors.api_down: 🔧 Generation service is temporarily unavailable. Try in a minute.
